description: Devil May Cry 3 originally released in 2005 is the hit sequel to Devil May Cry 2. Featuring all new weapons, fights and the newly added style mechanic.

v0.4.0.description:
- Different difficulties can now be automatically unlocked
- Added a minimum rank and difficulty for mission clear checks
- Added SS Rank checks (By default these are excluded locations)
- Mission order randomization
- Goal can be modified to require all missions be completed in any order

APWorld Specific:
- DeathLink tag is now enabled automatically if enabled in YAML
- Gun and Weapon skill level randomization are now separate options
- Minor fixes for M14 and SM2
v0.4.0.title: Devil May Cry 3 0.4.0

v0.5.0.description:
- Now uses the new and improved rewrite for archipelago_rs (Big kudos to @nex3)
- Universal Tracker support, UT can work without the yaml. This also makes it so UT is aware of the random mission order
- New Hint Game mode (This will appear as a separate client in the AP Launcher). Do Bloody Palace floors to generate hints! Number of floors needed per hint can be adjusted in the `host.yaml`
- Purchasing blue/purple orbs can be checks. (Purchasing gun levels and skills checks will most likely come in a later update)
- Red Orb Filler has been added (1000/2500/5000) to alleviate some grinding
- Say goodbye to the bank system. Item Syncing has been re-written and is now based off of the currently loaded save slot
- Skills are now properly given mid mission (and overall behave better)
- Crystal skull location now works, oops
- Re-organized where saves and sync data are. Files are now under `game_install/archipelago/(seed_{slot_name})/`

APWorld Specific:
- SS Rank Checks can be entirely removed
- There are a whole lot less generation failures now! 
- Gun upgrades are now classified as useful.
v0.5.0.title: Devil May Cry 3 0.5.0

v0.5.1.description:
- New Feature: Purchasing gun upgrades can now be checks (Configurable via YAML)
- Non-randomized parts of the game will be stored in data storage so pop tracker can be made aware of them
- Resolved item syncing related issues. Note: Checks will now only be received while you are mid mission/in game.
- Fixed the randomly goaling issue
- Gun levels are now properly applied mid mission
- Can no longer purchase skills if randomize skills is on
- Overlay message for what item has been sent out and to who in the event there is not an in game item get pop up (I.e Mission Complete checks or shop checks)
- Internal refactoring/clean up

APWorld Specific:
- General generation related fixes/improvements
- Fixed several logic errors
v0.5.1.title: Devil May Cry 3 0.5.1
